calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Daniel richardson, Esq. for Plaintiff: RPN Enterprises Inc. a California Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Pamela Nuccilelli, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): David Turgeon, as follows:
Principal $360,679.00
Prejudgment Interest $61,572.62
Attorney's Fees $6,381.00
Costs $1,,127.00 for a total of $429,759.62
Judgment signed in open court.
